narrative:
Danbury 5 (precinct in Ottawa County) has 1,031 registered voters, with 49.9% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 31.5% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 18.6%, a pronounced Republican lean of 12.9 percentage points.
